pages.text: In the wild, there are many different animals: big and small, fast and s l o w. But every animal has a part to play.

blocks.text: In the wild, there are many different animals:
big and small, fast and s l o w.
But every animal has a part to play.

pages.text: Elephants have long noses called trunks that sniff out water. They can find a drink even when it’s hard to see. And when they do, they trumpet to their friends: toot-toot!

blocks.text: Elephants have long noses called trunks that sniff out water. They can find a drink even when it’s hard to see.
And when they do, they trumpet to their friends: toot-toot!

pages.text: Rhinos like routine. They follow the same paths again and again, and make wide trails as they crash through the bush.

blocks.text: Rhinos like routine. They follow the same paths again and again,
and make wide trails as they crash through the bush.

pages.text: Hippos love to eat sweet, green grass, and lots of it. Munch-munch- munch. They short keep so the the water grass is next easier to to the reach. river

blocks.text: Hippos love to eat sweet, green grass, and lots of it. Munch-munch- munch.
They short keep so the the water grass is next easier to to the reach. river

pages.text: But what about monkeys? Oh, monkeys have an especially important job.

blocks.text: But what about monkeys?
Oh, monkeys have an especially important job.

pages.text: From sunrise to sunset, they’re on the go – climbing , tumbling and searching for food.

blocks.text: From sunrise to sunset, they’re on the go – climbing , tumbling and searching for food.

pages.text: Monkeys dangle by their feet from trees, looking at the world .nwod- edispu

blocks.text: Monkeys dangle by their feet from trees, looking at the world
.nwod- edispu

pages.text: They swing from branch to branch in groups of two, three and four at a time. What fun!

blocks.text: They swing from branch to branch in groups of two, three and four at a time. What fun!

pages.text: Mama monkeys can do it all with a baby clinging to their belly. What do the little ones see from ?ereht nwod

blocks.text: Mama monkeys can do it all with a baby clinging to their belly. What do the little ones see from
?ereht nwod

pages.text: When they want a snack, monkeys pick a flea straight from a chommie’s back.

blocks.text: When they want a snack, monkeys pick a flea straight from a chommie’s back.

pages.text: And when they’re hot and tired, they cannonba ll into the water.

blocks.text: And when they’re hot and tired, they cannonba ll
into the water.

pages.text: What’s the important job that monkeys have? They play all day. And that’s hard work!

blocks.text: What’s the important job that monkeys have? They play all day.
And that’s hard work!
